title: Departure from Ho Chi Minh City
description: Beginning my first international internship journey to Singapore.
lesson: Professional opportunities often come from being prepared and open to new experiences.

title: CPG Singapore Conference
description: Participated in professional discussions on sustainable design and modular construction.
lesson: Collaboration and interdisciplinary thinking are essential for future practice.

title: National University of Singapore
description: Visited one of Asia's leading research universities and explored its academic environment.
lesson: Research and practice can be integrated to address climate-responsive design.

title: Malaysia Stop
description: Experienced the relationship between Singapore and Johor Bahru.
lesson: Regional connectivity strongly shapes metropolitan development.
